title: Three Decades of Mobility
description: A data visualization project exploring the relationship between vehicle registration trends and cost of living over 30 years.
longDescription: Analyzes how areas with different housing costs show varying patterns of vehicle ownership using economic indicators like CPI. Built with React, D3.js, and TypeScript.
outcome: Interactive visualizations revealing 30-year mobility and cost-of-living trends.

title: AI-Enhanced Calculator
description: A modern calculator app with natural language processing powered by OpenAI GPT-3.5-turbo.
longDescription: Built with Expo and React Native. Supports conversational calculations and unit conversions through an AI-powered interface.
outcome: Conversational mobile calculator with NLP-driven unit conversions.

title: Cultural AI
description: A platform leveraging AI for cultural insights, recommendations, and personalized experiences.
longDescription: React Native frontend with Node.js/Express backend and SQL Server integration. Features AI-powered cultural analysis and content recommendations.
outcome: Full-stack cultural recommendation platform with AI analysis.
